SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Confirm before printing
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Show a confirmation dialog box before printing

Preference.app:title: Child Fare Rule
Preference.app:summary: Child tickets are charged at 60% of adult fare by default.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Print time with expense
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Print timestamp next to each expense in sales report

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Print stops for pass
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Print origin and destination stops for fixed fare passes

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Cancel receipt
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Print a receipt for cancelled tickets with the ticket number and refund amount

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Device ID
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Print unique device identifier on each ticket

ListPreference.app:title: Printer width
ListPreference.app:summary: Printer width in characters. Recommended: 32 for 50mm thermal printers or 48 for 80mm thermal printers

EditTextPreference.app:summary: Header text printed at top of tickets.
Footer text printed at bottom of tickets.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Add carriage return
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Carriage return character in addition to the new line character is required by some Printers at the end of each line.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Stage lock
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Enable to prevent issuing of tickets for old stops/stages

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Group tickets
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Enable to print a single ticket for multiple passengers

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Child tickets
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Enable to issue tickets for children. Disable to issue only adult tickets

EditTextPreference.app:title: Child ticket rate (%)
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Ticket rate as a percentage of adult ticket fare

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable passes
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Use concession passes to discount tickets based on a percentage or value

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Cancel last ticket
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Allow cancelling of the last ticket issued.

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Ignore Bluetooth error
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Bypass Bluetooth printer errors and continue ticket/report processing

Preference.app:title: Change settings PIN
Preference.app:summary: Warning: disabling PIN will allow anyone to modify routes, fares, and settings

Preference.app:title: Remote management
Preference.app:summary: Web based location tracking, sales reports, and route management

SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Beep on error
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Beep the speaker when there is an error
